overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a lush tropical jungle with dense red flowering undergrowth, transitioning to a white sand beach with ancient stone ruins. The camera follows in third-person as the character moves from enclosed forest to open coastal environment with cinematic lighting and god rays filtering through the canopy.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense tropical jungle interior with red undergrowth

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through dense jungle vegetation with bow and spear on back, navigating around large ferns and red flowering plants

entered.detail: tall dense trees forming a thick canopy overhead with dappled sunlight filtering through
vibrant red flowering bushes and plants covering the forest floor
slender palm trunks rising through the canopy in the background
large green ferns and broadleaf plants filling the undergrowth

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dense tropical jungle with thick vegetation and vibrant red flowering undergrowth. The character walks forward through the enclosed forest space with god rays filtering through the canopy above. Tall palm trees are visible in the distance while dense ferns and broadleaf plants fill the immediate surroundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical forest edge transitioning to coastal view

events.description: white sand beach and ocean become visible through the palm trees ahead

agents.ego_description: moving through tall grasses and ferns toward the coastline, with the environment opening up to reveal the beach

entered.detail: bright white sandy beach becoming visible through the trees in the distance
overgrown stone ruins and structures visible on the distant coastline

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the forest edge where the vegetation becomes less dense and palm trees dominate the view. The lighting becomes brighter as the canopy opens up, revealing a stunning white sand beach and ancient stone ruins in the distance. The red flowering plants give way to tall grasses and ferns as the coastal environment approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: white sand beach with ancient coastal ruins

events.description: character steps from vegetation onto the white sand beach

agents.ego_description: walking along the white sand beach toward the ancient ruins, with the ocean visible to the right

entered.detail: calm blue ocean water visible beyond the beach with distant islands
red wooden boats or canoes resting on the sand near the tree line

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a bright white sand beach with the ocean visible in the background. Ancient stone ruins covered in vegetation dominate the left side of the beach, while palm trees line the edge. The character walks along the sand past abandoned red boats, moving toward the distant ruins with full sunlight illuminating the open coastal scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense tropical jungle that gradually opens into a bright, sun-drenched coastal landscape. It begins within an enclosed forest of thick vegetation and vibrant red flowering undergrowth, where god rays filter through a high canopy of palm trees and broadleaf plants. As the character moves forward, the vegetation thins and the lighting brightens, shifting the scenery from dense ferns to tall grasses as the forest edge reveals a distant white sand beach. The scene then expands fully as the character emerges onto the bright sand, passing abandoned red boats while the ocean opens up in the background. Finally, the camera follows the path toward ancient, vegetation-covered stone ruins under the full illumination of the open coast.
